subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth and doth send them down as He willeth by His command, and verily He hath ever been mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق و ینزلها کیف یشاء بامر من عنده و انه قد کان علی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of the Manifestation of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
